## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kitty Lybrand_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "nothing but ads every 5 minutes so not really worth it. also have to pay for every thing that will benefit you. would not suggest even with the "small" pros in it. Just disappointed all around"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Apr 22, 2026 - Apr 22, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sarah Huguenin_, Apr 22, 2026, 4/5: "Really like this app, it actually helps and keeps me motivated. The design is nice and easy to use, and tracking progress feels good. Only downside is a lot of features are locked behind premium, which is kinda annoying. Also gets a bit repetitive after some time. Still a good app overall."
